Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

Class AbstractIntegerValidator<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidator<S,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableValidator<S,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractNumberValidator<S,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractIntegerValidator<S,T>
Type Parameters:
S - the type of validator returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being validated
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableValidator<S,T>, ExtensibleIntegerValidator<S,T>, ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,T>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
IntegerValidatorImpl, LongValidatorImpl, PrimitiveIntegerValidatorImpl
public abstract class AbstractIntegerValidator<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>> extends AbstractNumberValidator<S,T> implements ExtensibleIntegerValidator<S,T>
Extensible implementation of ExtensibleIntegerValidator.

    S
    isNotWholeNumber()
    Ensures that the actual value is not a whole value.

    Ensures that the actual value is a whole value.
